_readme: Tooltip text shown on the loading screen carousel while cycling through each entity/gun. Fill in "tip" for each entry (leave "" to skip - that entry will just show its title with no tip text). "title" is a suggested display name and can be edited too.

sdAbomination.title: sdAbomination
sdAbomination.tip: A mass of flesh and bone that seeks to add more to itself.

sdAmphid.title: sdAmphid
sdAmphid.tip: Amphids are relatively weak, but traverse large distance between their jumps.

sdArea.title: sdArea
sdArea.tip: This was once a peaceful place.

sdAsp.title: sdAsp
sdAsp.tip: Asps are relatively mobile squishy, so precision weapons can deal with them quickly.

sdAsteroid.title: sdAsteroid
sdAsteroid.tip: Asteroids can sometimes contain crystal, or metal shards.

sdBSUTurret.title: sdBSUTurret
sdBSUTurret.tip: These turrets attack entities which damage the base (green BSUs only).

sdBadDog.title: sdBadDog
sdBadDog.tip: Bad dogs can sometimes be domesticated, and become your allies.

sdBall.title: sdBall
sdBall.tip: A bouncy ball which can be tossed around. These come in small and large size.

sdBarrel.title: sdBarrel
sdBarrel.tip: Explosive munitions useful for clearing out ground.

sdBaseShieldingUnit.title: sdBaseShieldingUnit
sdBaseShieldingUnit.tip: Prevents hostile invaders from destroying your base.

sdBeacon.title: sdBeacon
sdBeacon.tip: Never get lost again! Track one of these to mark it on the map.

sdBeamProjector.title: sdBeamProjector
sdBeamProjector.tip: A machine devised to stop the encroaching void-when one of these are deployed, the Council isn't far behind. Will drop an unstable core upon completion.

sdBiter.title: sdBiter
sdBiter.tip: Biters can potentially poison you, making you take damage over time.

sdBlock.title: sdBlock
sdBlock.tip: Ground frequently contains stuff, like crystals, junk or even enemies.

sdBloodDecal.title: sdBloodDecal
sdBloodDecal.tip: Blood on the walls attracts roaches and blood moths. Use mop to clear the stains!

sdBomb.title: sdBomb
sdBomb.tip: Bombs deal massive ground damage, and can be sped up with area amplifier.

sdButton.title: sdButton
sdButton.tip: Buttons can be used to manually activate a lot of base equipment when cabled with those.

sdCamera.title: sdCamera
sdCamera.tip: Cameras can detect activity going on around them, like base being under attack, for example (requires Star Defender Notificator App).

sdCapsulePod.title: sdCapsulePod
sdCapsulePod.tip: You can sleep in this, and it can be protected by BSU.

sdCom.title: sdCom
sdCom.tip: Used to control doors and turrets on a cable network.

sdCommandCentre.title: sdCommandCentre
sdCommandCentre.tip: Used to send messages at long range, and activate LRTP pads.

sdCouncilIncinerator.title: sdCouncilIncinerator
sdCouncilIncinerator.tip: An incredibly tough machine deployed by the Council. Fires high-damage projectile bursts, summons Council drones, and occasionally ignites everything nearby it.

sdCouncilMachine.title: sdCouncilMachine
sdCouncilMachine.tip: Summons more Council to this planet.

sdCouncilNullifier.title: sdCouncilNullifier
sdCouncilNullifier.tip: Halts progress on Mothership Matter Containers and Dark Matter Beam Projectors.

sdCraftingBench.title: sdCraftingBench
sdCraftingBench.tip: Used to craft weapons and armor.

sdCrystal.title: sdCrystal
sdCrystal.tip: The main source of matter on many planets.

sdCrystalCombiner.title: sdCrystalCombiner
sdCrystalCombiner.tip: Used to combine crystals into higher tiers.

sdCube.title: sdCube
sdCube.tip: Strange alien machines that seem to protect this world. Usually neutral, until you destroy something.

sdDoor.title: sdDoor
sdDoor.tip: You walk in and out of it.

sdDrone.title: sdDrone
sdDrone.tip: More mobile at the cost of being less potent. Annoying in large numbers.

sdEnemyMech.title: sdEnemyMech
sdEnemyMech.tip: The Velox flying mech has a weakpoint in the back. Attack the weakpoint to deal massive damage!

sdExcavator.title: sdExcavator
sdExcavator.tip: Excavators can be repaired with metal shards, or mining duration extended with matter storage shards like Cube shards or Erthal energy cells.

sdFaceCrab.title: sdFaceCrab
sdFaceCrab.tip: Face crabs attach to your head rather quickly. Rapid firing weapons quickly dispose of attached face crabs, as long as you aim up.

sdFactionSpawner.title: sdFactionSpawner
sdFactionSpawner.tip: Some factions will use methods of rapid reinforcement in form of structures. Destroy these to stop them!

sdFleshGrabber.title: sdFleshGrabber
sdFleshGrabber.tip: The Flesh will sometimes attempt to grab you, and devour you.

sdGib.title: sdGib
sdGib.tip: Some enemies can be gibbed when dealt overkill damage. Some creatures can be attracted by gibs.

sdGrass.title: sdGrass
sdGrass.tip: Crystal crabs can be fed grass to increase their efficiency.

sdGrub.title: sdGrub
sdGrub.tip: Grubs are mostly passive, unless they were attacked.

sdGuanako.title: sdGuanako
sdGuanako.tip: Guanakos are mostly friendly, unless provoked.

sdGuanakoStructure.title: sdGuanakoStructure
sdGuanakoStructure.tip: Guanakos like to mine crystals, and put them in their tent.

sdGun.title: sdGun
sdGun.tip: Select the proper weapon for proper scenario! For example, a pistol is weaker versus dirt compared to explosive weaponry.

sdHover.title: sdHover
sdHover.tip: Hovers require matter, but are an efficient and safer method of transportation.

sdJunk.title: sdJunk
sdJunk.tip: Lots of junk items can be mined out of dirt, and some are even wanted by the Mothership.

sdLamp.title: sdLamp
sdLamp.tip: Lamps brighten up areas. Make sure to place them wherever it is dark.

sdLandMine.title: sdLandMine
sdLandMine.tip: Land mines are difficult to spot, they require close proximity to be spotted, and physical contact to activate.

sdLandScanner.title: sdLandScanner
sdLandScanner.tip: The Mothership will sometimes require a scan of planet's surface. These devices can also point to surface containing something inside it.

sdLifeBox.title: sdLifeBox
sdLifeBox.tip: One of many places to store your character in.

sdLiquidAbsorber.title: sdLiquidAbsorber
sdLiquidAbsorber.tip: Liquid absorbers evaporate liquid and convert it into gas sometimes at a small matter cost.

sdLongRangeAntenna.title: sdLongRangeAntenna
sdLongRangeAntenna.tip: Antennas, when activated, can be teleported to using long range teleporters. Avoid placing them into your bases!

sdLongRangeTeleport.title: sdLongRangeTeleport
sdLongRangeTeleport.tip: Long range teleports are used in transporting items to the mothership, and vice versa.

sdLost.title: sdLost
sdLost.tip: Some mobs can turn you into a statue. Use a rescue cloner to have a safe way to rebuild when it happens!

sdMatterAmplifier.title: sdMatterAmplifier
sdMatterAmplifier.tip: Matter amplifiers speed up crystal matter generation of a crystal which is put inside the amplifier, and can shield them.

sdMatterContainer.title: sdMatterContainer
sdMatterContainer.tip: Matter containers are a basic matter storage. Size can be extended when placing multiple next to each other.

sdMatterMatrix.title: sdMatterMatrix
sdMatterMatrix.tip: Matter generation matrix can store value up equal up to 20 crystals of 40960 matter, making it a very good matter bank.

sdMeow.title: sdMeow
sdMeow.tip: Meow explodes when defeated into a large cluster of small grenades. Stay distant.

sdMimic.title: sdMimic
sdMimic.tip: Mimics can take form of almost any entity, and will pounce when their prey is close.

sdMothershipContainer.title: sdMothershipContainer
sdMothershipContainer.tip: The Mothership matter container is frequently assaulted by the Council. Ensure container safety for maximum reward!

sdNode.title: sdNode
sdNode.tip: Nodes can be used to wire a network of cables together.

sdObelisk.title: sdObelisk
sdObelisk.tip: Obelisks come in many types, and activating them causes changes to the world.

sdOctopus.title: sdOctopus
sdOctopus.tip: The octopus will try to devour you, or your weapons. Staying distant and mobile is the best way to defeat them.

sdOverlord.title: sdOverlord
sdOverlord.tip: Overlords announce what they are about to attack, and sometimes get bored of attacking something.

sdPlayerDrone.title: sdPlayerDrone
sdPlayerDrone.tip: Star Defenders (other players) can install a weapon on a player piloted drone.

sdPlayerOverlord.title: sdPlayerOverlord
sdPlayerOverlord.tip: In game settings, you can select to also play as the Overlord.

sdQuickie.title: sdQuickie
sdQuickie.tip: Quickies generally attack everything in it's way.

sdRescueTeleport.title: sdRescueTeleport
sdRescueTeleport.tip: Rescue teleports are called whenever you are about to die. Make sure they are charged, and stay in their range when that happens.

sdRift.title: sdRift
sdRift.tip: Dimensional portals spawn all sorts of creatures from them, and close over time.

sdRoach.title: sdRoach
sdRoach.tip: Roaches are attracted by blood on the walls. Clean your base's walls to prevent their intrusion!

sdSandWorm.title: sdSandWorm
sdSandWorm.tip: Worms can traverse through dirt, making them difficult to hit. Best to stay in the air to force exposure.

sdSetrBeholder.title: sdSetrBeholder
sdSetrBeholder.tip: The Setr Beholder has a shield on top, protecting the pilot. Aim for the parts below!

sdSetrDestroyer.title: sdSetrDestroyer
sdSetrDestroyer.tip: The Setr Destroyer can call in backup when taking damage. Wath out for purple flares!

sdShurgConverter.title: sdShurgConverter
sdShurgConverter.tip: The Shurg converted converts oxygen into matter, very slowly.

sdShurgExcavator.title: sdShurgExcavator
sdShurgExcavator.tip: A tiny excavator from Shurgs, it terraforms enviroment to fit needs of Shurg.

sdShurgManualTurret.title: sdShurgManualTurret
sdShurgManualTurret.tip: A vehicle used by the Shurgs, best to combat while in equal or higher elevation.

sdShurgTurret.title: sdShurgTurret
sdShurgTurret.tip: Shurg turrets generally protect the Shurg oxygen converters.

sdSolarMatterDistributor.title: sdSolarMatterDistributor
sdSolarMatterDistributor.tip: Solar matter distributors are mobile solar panels, and can give matter directly to a Mothership matter container (if there is one)

sdSpider.title: sdSpider
sdSpider.tip: The Erthals like to stay distant. Closing the distance is their weakness.

sdStalker.title: sdStalker
sdStalker.tip: The Stalker remains mostly invisible until provoked.

sdStealer.title: sdStealer
sdStealer.tip: Stealers like to steal unattended crystals, weapons and more. Make sure to crate valuables outside your bases!

sdSteeringWheel.title: sdSteeringWheel
sdSteeringWheel.tip: Steering wheel requires skybase thrusters attached to the base to move the base around.

sdStorage.title: sdStorage
sdStorage.tip: Storage crates can store variety of items, like weapons and crystals.

sdStorageTank.title: sdStorageTank
sdStorageTank.tip: Storage tanks can be used to store all sorts of liquids.

sdSunPanel.title: sdSunPanel
sdSunPanel.tip: Solar panels are a renewable way to obtain matter, when crystals are not an option.

sdTask.title: sdTask
sdTask.tip: Completing tasks can make you eligible for some rewards that are exclusive to the Mothership.

sdTeleport.title: sdTeleport
sdTeleport.tip: Teleport nodes can teleport almost anything, as long as it fits the size.

sdThruster.title: sdThruster
sdThruster.tip: Skybase thrusters are necessary for movable bases. More thrusters makes the process faster.

sdTutel.title: sdTutel
sdTutel.tip: Tutels are immune to lava and grow stronger per bite. Stay distant!

sdTzyrgAbsorber.title: sdTzyrgAbsorber
sdTzyrgAbsorber.tip: Tzyrg devices like these are known to stop earthquakes near them.

sdTzyrgMortar.title: sdTzyrgMortar
sdTzyrgMortar.tip: Tzyrgs have mortars which can deliver a barrage of explosions in a short time. Destroy them quickly!

sdUpgradeStation.title: sdUpgradeStation
sdUpgradeStation.tip: Upgrade stations allow some character upgrades to reach higher level. Upgrade stations can be upgraded via chipsets from the Mothership.

sdVeloxFortifier.title: sdVeloxFortifier
sdVeloxFortifier.tip: Velox fortifiers are devices which grant shielding capabilities to all Velox units. Destroy them.

sdVeloxMiner.title: sdVeloxMiner
sdVeloxMiner.tip: Velox miners are used by Velox to mine terrain and take crystals.

sdVirus.title: sdVirus
sdVirus.tip: Virus grows when it drinks water. Larger sizes burst into several smaller virus on death.

sdWater.title: sdWater
sdWater.tip: Water can be used to cool some things down, like the crystal combiner, for example.

sdWeaponBench.title: sdWeaponBench
sdWeaponBench.tip: Weapon bench can be used to upgrade weapons and repair armor.

sdWeaponMerger.title: sdWeaponMerger
sdWeaponMerger.tip: Weapon merging bench can copy power of a stronger weapon and give it to a weaker one.

sdWorkbench.title: sdWorkbench
sdWorkbench.tip: Workbench is a must if you want to access stronger armor, utility tools and more.

sdZektaronDreadnought.title: sdZektaronDreadnought
sdZektaronDreadnought.tip: The Zektaron Dreadnought has a weakpoint in it's triple beam railgun.

CLASS_PISTOL.title: Pistol
CLASS_PISTOL.tip: Costs 0 matter to fire. Useful in a pinch.

CLASS_RIFLE.title: Assault rifle
CLASS_RIFLE.tip: Standard-issue SD rifle since forever. High ROF, middling damage.

CLASS_SHOTGUN.title: Shotgun
CLASS_SHOTGUN.tip: All shotguns have a close range damage multiplier-and are quite effective at mining.

CLASS_ROCKET.title: Rocket launcher
CLASS_ROCKET.tip: Deals extra damage to vehicles and mechs.

CLASS_SPARK.title: Spark
CLASS_SPARK.tip: Fires explosive plasma gobs at a modest ROF.

CLASS_BUILD_TOOL.title: Build tool
CLASS_BUILD_TOOL.tip: Don't lose this-you're gonna need it.

CLASS_CRYSTAL_SHARD.title: Crystal shard
CLASS_CRYSTAL_SHARD.tip: A little extra matter never hurt anyone.

CLASS_NEEDLE.title: Needle
CLASS_NEEDLE.tip: Low damage precision weapon. Can penetrate some blocks.

CLASS_STIMPACK.title: Stimpack
CLASS_STIMPACK.tip: You never know when you'll need to reload just a little faster.

CLASS_TRIPLE_RAIL.title: Cube-gun
CLASS_TRIPLE_RAIL.tip: A strange high-ROF laser weapon. Perhaps it can be improved upon?

CLASS_FISTS.title: Fists
CLASS_FISTS.tip: The first rule about fight club...

CLASS_RAIL_PISTOL.title: Cube-pistol
CLASS_RAIL_PISTOL.tip: Strange burst-fire laser weapon. Perhaps it can be improved upon?

CLASS_RAYGUN.title: Ray Gun C-01y
CLASS_RAYGUN.tip: C-01r's violent sibling. Shotgun that fires speed penetrating projectiles.

CLASS_FALKOK_PSI_CUTTER.title: Falkonian PSI-cutter
CLASS_FALKOK_PSI_CUTTER.tip: Trickshot machine that reflects off any impact angle.

CLASS_RAIL_SHOTGUN.title: Cube-shotgun
CLASS_RAIL_SHOTGUN.tip: Strange weapon that fires a spread of several lasers. Perhaps it can be improved upon?

CLASS_RAIL_CANNON.title: Velox Rail Cannon
CLASS_RAIL_CANNON.tip: Hold the trigger to charge a penetrating shot.

CLASS_CUBE_SHARD.title: Cube shard
CLASS_CUBE_SHARD.tip: Can be used to increase matter capacity, or craft other Cube items.

CLASS_LMG.title: Light Machine Gun
CLASS_LMG.tip: Sacrifices some ROF for much more damage.

CLASS_LVL1_LIGHT_ARMOR.title: SD-01 Light Armor
CLASS_LVL1_LIGHT_ARMOR.tip: Slightly reduces incoming damage with no movement penalty.

CLASS_LVL1_MEDIUM_ARMOR.title: SD-01 Duty Armor
CLASS_LVL1_MEDIUM_ARMOR.tip: Modestly reduces incoming damage with a slight movement penalty.

CLASS_LVL1_HEAVY_ARMOR.title: SD-01 Combat Armor
CLASS_LVL1_HEAVY_ARMOR.tip: Modestly reduces incoming damage in exchange for a movement penalty.

CLASS_ROCKET_MK2.title: Guided Rocket Launcher
CLASS_ROCKET_MK2.tip: Rockets will home to your cursor.

CLASS_HEALING_RAY.title: Cube-Medgun
CLASS_HEALING_RAY.tip: Strange device that fires a healing beam.

CLASS_LVL2_LIGHT_ARMOR.title: SD-02 Light Armor
CLASS_LVL2_LIGHT_ARMOR.tip: Reduces incoming damage with no movement penalty.

CLASS_LVL2_MEDIUM_ARMOR.title: SD-02 Duty Armor
CLASS_LVL2_MEDIUM_ARMOR.tip: Modestly reduces incoming damage with a slight movement penalty.

CLASS_LVL2_HEAVY_ARMOR.title: SD-02 Combat Armor
CLASS_LVL2_HEAVY_ARMOR.tip: Effectively reduces incoming damage in exchange for a movement penalty.

CLASS_ADMIN_TELEPORTER.title: Admin tool for teleporting
CLASS_ADMIN_TELEPORTER.tip: Now you see me, now you don't.

CLASS_LVL3_LIGHT_ARMOR.title: SD-03 Light Armor
CLASS_LVL3_LIGHT_ARMOR.tip: Modestly reduces incoming damage with no movement penalty.

CLASS_LVL3_MEDIUM_ARMOR.title: SD-03 Duty Armor
CLASS_LVL3_MEDIUM_ARMOR.tip: Effectively reduces incoming damage with a slight movement penalty.

CLASS_LVL3_HEAVY_ARMOR.title: SD-03 Combat Armor
CLASS_LVL3_HEAVY_ARMOR.tip: Drastically reduces incoming damage in exchange for a movement penalty.

CLASS_EMERGENCY_INSTRUCTOR.title: Emergency instructor
CLASS_EMERGENCY_INSTRUCTOR.tip: Just push the button to summon him once more.

CLASS_FMECH_MINIGUN.title: Velox Flying Mech Minigun
CLASS_FMECH_MINIGUN.tip: Heavy continuous-fire projectile weapon. Has a short spool-up time before firing.

CLASS_SNIPER.title: Sniper rifle
CLASS_SNIPER.tip: Yippee-ki-yay! High damage penetrating precision weapon.

CLASS_COUNCIL_PISTOL.title: Council Pistol
CLASS_COUNCIL_PISTOL.tip: Punishing bolt pistol when used by the right hands.

CLASS_COUNCIL_BURST_RAIL.title: Council Burst Rail
CLASS_COUNCIL_BURST_RAIL.tip: Punishing hitscan weapon, when in the right hands.

CLASS_METAL_SHARD.title: Alienic metal shard
CLASS_METAL_SHARD.tip: You're gonna need a lot of these. Useful for upgrading workbenches and crafting.

CLASS_WYRMHIDE.title: Wyrmhide
CLASS_WYRMHIDE.tip: Decent armor that naturally regenerates. Will do in a pinch.

CLASS_PORTAL.title: ASHPD
CLASS_PORTAL.tip: When life gives you lemons, you build a portal gun.

CLASS_OVERLORD_BLASTER.title: Overlord\'s blaster
CLASS_OVERLORD_BLASTER.tip: Strange heavy alien blaster. Doesn't work unless unlocked at a weapon bench. Useful for crafting.

CLASS_TOPS_DMR.title: Task Ops DMR
CLASS_TOPS_DMR.tip: Highly effective penetrating precision weapon. Request one from the Mothership today!

CLASS_TOPS_SHOTGUN.title: Task Ops Shotgun
CLASS_TOPS_SHOTGUN.tip: Highly effective spread-fire weapon. Request one from the Mothership today!

CLASS_CUBE_SPEAR.title: Cube Empty Speargun
CLASS_CUBE_SPEAR.tip: Fires a spread of Empty rails. Effective against unsuspecting humanoids.

CLASS_COMBAT_INSTRUCTOR.title: Combat instructor
CLASS_COMBAT_INSTRUCTOR.tip: In your hour of greatest need, he will appear. All you nede to do is ask.

CLASS_SETR_PLASMA_SHOTGUN.title: Setr Plasma Shotgun
CLASS_SETR_PLASMA_SHOTGUN.tip: Fires a spread of gobs of plasma.

CLASS_CUBE_TELEPORTER.title: Cube-teleporter
CLASS_CUBE_TELEPORTER.tip: Teleports you to where you click, as long as you can see it.

CLASS_RAYRIFLE.title: Ray Rifle TCoRR
CLASS_RAYRIFLE.tip: The C-01r's bitter rival. Request one from the Mothership today!

CLASS_LIQUID_CARRIER.title: Liquid carrier
CLASS_LIQUID_CARRIER.tip: Holds up to 1 full block of liquid.

CLASS_CUSTOM_RIFLE.title: Rifle
CLASS_CUSTOM_RIFLE.tip: Mix and match parts to your heart's content at a weapon workbench!

CLASS_SCORE_SHARD.title: Score shard
CLASS_SCORE_SHARD.tip: Collect them all! Higher scores increase your level, allowing you to build more items.

CLASS_MOP.title: Mop
CLASS_MOP.tip: Cleans blood and other strange spatters.

CLASS_TELEPORT_SWORD.title: Time shifter blade
CLASS_TELEPORT_SWORD.tip: Allows you to teleport wherever you can see, slashing through anything in its path.

CLASS_COUNCIL_SHOTGUN.title: Council Shotgun
CLASS_COUNCIL_SHOTGUN.tip: Punishing slug shotgun, when used in the right hands.

CLASS_ZEKTARON_FOCUS_BEAM.title: Zektaron Focus Beam
CLASS_ZEKTARON_FOCUS_BEAM.tip: High-ROF continous-fire laser weapon with a short spool-up time. Burns targets overtime.

CLASS_AREA_AMPLIFIER.title: Area amplifier
CLASS_AREA_AMPLIFIER.tip: Accelerates time for objects hit by its effect radius.

CLASS_ILLUSION_MAKER.title: Illusion maker
CLASS_ILLUSION_MAKER.tip: Creates a glass copy of anything you shoot it at.

CLASS_SHURG_PISTOL.title: Shurg Pistol
CLASS_SHURG_PISTOL.tip: Shurg projectiles are liable to ricochet off of many surprising angles.

CLASS_SHURG_SNIPER.title: Shurg sniper rifle
CLASS_SHURG_SNIPER.tip: This Shurg weapon's projectile velocity is too high to ricochet normally. This makes it a decent penetrating weapon.

CLASS_SETR_LMG.title: Setr Light Machine Gun
CLASS_SETR_LMG.tip: Requires the user to be crouching to use it. Has a short spool-up time.

CLASS_CRYSTAL_CUTTER.title: Crystal cutter
CLASS_CRYSTAL_CUTTER.tip: Can cut big crystals into 4 smaller crystals.

CLASS_DRAIN_RIFLE.title: Drain-rifle
CLASS_DRAIN_RIFLE.tip: Fires projectiles that deal AOE damage around them. Projectiles overcharge if the user has taken any type of Lost damage.

CLASS_SARRONIAN_BIO_ENERGY_LAUNCHER.title: Sarronian Bio-Energy Launcher
CLASS_SARRONIAN_BIO_ENERGY_LAUNCHER.tip: Fires gobs of explosive material, which detonate into crosses of 4 projectiles.

CLASS_MERGER_CORE.title: Weapon merger core
CLASS_MERGER_CORE.tip: Used in a merging bench to apply other components to a weapon.

CLASS_TOPS_PLASMA_RIFLE.title: Task Ops Plasma Rifle
CLASS_TOPS_PLASMA_RIFLE.tip: High-damage plasma rifle. Request one from the Mothership today!

CLASS_ERTHAL_ENERGY_CELL.title: Erthal energy cell
CLASS_ERTHAL_ENERGY_CELL.tip: Can store extra energy. Potentially useful for crafting, too.

CLASS_WELD_TOOL.title: Elevator weld tool
CLASS_WELD_TOOL.tip: Used to attach entities to an elevator or skybase steering wheel.

CLASS_UPGRADE_STATION_CHIPSET.title: Upgrade station chipset
CLASS_UPGRADE_STATION_CHIPSET.tip: Allows you to upgrade your character more at an uprade station.

CLASS_EXALTED_CORE.title: Exalted core
CLASS_EXALTED_CORE.tip: Increases a gun's damage by 25% when merged at a weapon bench.

CLASS_CUBE_FUSION_CORE.title: Cube fusion core
CLASS_CUBE_FUSION_CORE.tip: Decreases a gun's matter cost by 25% when merged at a weapon bench.

CLASS_CUBE_VOID_CAPACITOR.title: Cube void capacitor
CLASS_CUBE_VOID_CAPACITOR.tip: Fires crystallizing beams in rapid succession, and causes projectiles to be reflected away from its user.

CLASS_UNSTABLE_CORE.title: Unstable core
CLASS_UNSTABLE_CORE.tip: Useful for increasing a weapon's power at a workbench.

CLASS_STALKER_BEAM.title: Stalker Psychotic Beam
CLASS_STALKER_BEAM.tip: Alien laser weapon with the unique ability to give your enemies schizophrenia.

CLASS_STALKER_RIFLE.title: Stalker Rapid Rifle
CLASS_STALKER_RIFLE.tip: Alien energy weapon that has a homing alt-fire mode.

CLASS_STALKER_CLONER.title: Stalker Clone Ray
CLASS_STALKER_CLONER.tip: Alien technology that allows you to create Evil Clones of anyone you can touch with it.

CLASS_REPAIR_TOOL.title: Vehicle repair tool
CLASS_REPAIR_TOOL.tip: It ain't got no gas in it.

CLASS_TELEKINETICS.title: Gravity gun
CLASS_TELEKINETICS.tip: Throw objects around with your mind.

CLASS_DRAIN_SHOTGUN.title: Drain-shotgun
CLASS_DRAIN_SHOTGUN.tip: Functions identically to the drain-rifle, firing a barrage of smaller projectiles.

CLASS_DRAIN_SNIPER.title: Drain-sniper-rifle
CLASS_DRAIN_SNIPER.tip: Functions identically to the drain-rifle, firing a single high-damage projectile.

CLASS_HIGH_COUNCIL_SWORD.title: Council Energy Blade
CLASS_HIGH_COUNCIL_SWORD.tip: Fancy saber that projects energy arcs with each swing. Arcs can penetrate through multiple blocks.

CLASS_MATTER_CONTAINER_CHIPSET.title: Matter container chipset
CLASS_MATTER_CONTAINER_CHIPSET.tip: Used to upgrade Advanced Matter Containers.

CLASS_TOPS_GRENADE_LAUNCHER.title: Task Ops Grenade Launcher
CLASS_TOPS_GRENADE_LAUNCHER.tip: Request even more dakka at the Mothership today!

CLASS_PHASE_RIFLE.title: Phased Plasma Rifle SD-74
CLASS_PHASE_RIFLE.tip: Using alien technology as its power core, it can rapidly fire strong plasma projectiles. Will eventually overheat.

CLASS_OVERLORD_BLASTER2.title: Overlord\'s shotgun
CLASS_OVERLORD_BLASTER2.tip: Strange heavy alien blaster. Doesn't work if far away from its owner, unless unlocked at a weapon bench.

CLASS_COUNCIL_BURST_RAIL2.title: Council Burst Rail v2
CLASS_COUNCIL_BURST_RAIL2.tip: Improved version of a punishing burst weapon.

CLASS_COUNCIL_SHOTGUN2.title: Council Shotgun v2
CLASS_COUNCIL_SHOTGUN2.tip: Improved version of a punishing slug weapon.

CLASS_COUNCIL_PISTOL2.title: Council Pistol v2
CLASS_COUNCIL_PISTOL2.tip: Improved version of a punishing bolt weapon.

CLASS_ANTI_TANK.title: Anti Tank Rifle SD-57
CLASS_ANTI_TANK.tip: Craftable hitscan weapon with a generous vehicle damage multiplier.

CLASS_BATTLE_RIFLE.title: Battle Rifle SD-97
CLASS_BATTLE_RIFLE.tip: Next-gen OICW, with select-fire rifle or grenade launcher modes.

CLASS_HEAVY_ROCKET.title: Rocket Launcher SD-202
CLASS_HEAVY_ROCKET.tip: Strong rocket launcher with a homing fire alt mode.
